_comment: Multi-level mining/attack speed modifier. Each level needs 90 'redstone units' to commit. Sources contribute their unit_value per item: redstone dust = 1 unit, redstone block = 9 units. So level 1 = 90 dust OR 10 blocks OR 45 dust + 5 blocks. Each level scales cost by 1.5: 90, 135, 203, 304... level_cost_scaling drives that. Each level consumes one modifier slot.
